name: Clone
description: This spell makes an inert duplicate of a creature. If the original individual has been slain, its soul immediately transfers to the clone.

name: Earthquake
description: Seismic disturbance in an 80-ft. radius collapses structures and opens fissures for 1 round.

name: Greater Prying Eyes
description: This spell functions like prying eyes, except that the eyes can see everything as if they had true seeing.

name: Maze
description: You banish the subject into an extradimensional labyrinth. Each round on its turn, it may attempt to escape the labyrinth by making a DC 20 Intelligence check.

name: Mind Blank
description: The subject is protected from all devices and spells that gather information about the target through divination magic, and is immune to all mind-affecting spells and effects.

name: Polar Ray
description: A blue-white ray of freezing air and ice springs from your hand. You must succeed on a ranged touch attack with the ray to deal 1d6 points of cold damage per caster level (maximum 25d6) and 2d4 points of Dexterity drain.

name: Power Word Stun
description: You utter a single word of power that causes one creature of your choice to become stunned, whether or not it can hear the word.

name: Prismatic Wall
description: Prismatic wall creates a vertical, opaque wall—a shimmering, multicolored plane of light that protects you from all forms of attack.

name: Sunburst
description: Sunburst causes a globe of searing radiance to explode silently from a point you select. All creatures in the globe are blinded and take 6d6 points of damage. Undead creatures take 1d6 points of damage per caster level (maximum 25d6).
